title: Teamsterz Beast Machine Dino Car Age 3+ Play Set | 10 Dinosaur Cars Included | Two Assortments Available With One Supplied At Random | 10 Pack Car Set | Dino Gifts For Boys And Girls Aged 3+
features: TEAMSTERZ BEAST MACHINE DINOSAUR CARS - Is your child Dinosaur mad, then this play set is perfect for your little one. Whether racing along with friends, setting up your very own Jurassic world or taking your favourite car wherever you go, you have plenty to choose from with this Dino car multipack. With so many cars too chose from your little one can race around, making this the perfect gift for any enthusiastic little driver, offering hours of imaginative fun!

FEATURES - This Beast Machine Playset includes 10 x cars with all being a different dinosaur featuring Sharks, T-Rex's, Crocodiles, Dragons and a variety of different Dinosaurs. With this play set your little one can be encouraged to develop their social skills, imagination and fine motor skills by playing with friends or letting their imagination go wild. Our range of Monster Vehicle toys are fantastic toys for children aged 3 and over to learn through playing.

THE PERFECT GIFT OR PRESENT - This is the ideal toy for kids who are interested in Dinosaur, making this the perfect gift for any little animal lover. watch your childs face light up as they open this Dinosaur Themed Car Play Set. Let their imaginations go wild, by building tracks to race around or having the ultimate dinosaur attack that takes over your home. This set is ideal for birthday presents, christmas present and stocking fillers.

PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS - Includes 10 x Dinosaur Cars. Each car is approximately a 3-inch scale and feature a high quality detail. Package Dimensions - H19cm x W3.8cm x D28cm. Two assortments with one picked and supplied at random Suitable for children aged 3+

TEAMSTERZ RANGE - Teamsterz offers an extensive range of collectable vehicles from their Monster Moverz Transporters, Emergency City and their Metro City range. Learning is made possible by the Teamsterz Range by interacting with their realistic light and sound vehicles. Teamsterz also offers a wide range of playsets, garages and track sets.
